title: Industrial Electrician, Oslo Rotation
excerpt: Join a structured project team delivering modern commercial installations in Oslo.
summary: We are recruiting experienced industrial electricians for a long-term rotation project in Oslo. You will work in a safety-focused crew with clear handover routines.
responsibilities: Install and maintain low-voltage electrical systems according to Norwegian standards.
Read technical drawings and execute cable routing and panel connections.
Report progress daily and coordinate with site supervisors.
requirements: Minimum 3 years of industrial or construction electrical experience.
Valid electrical qualifications recognized in EEA or equivalent pathway.
Strong attention to safety documentation and quality checks.
whatWeOffer: Competitive hourly salary with structured rotation planning.
Accommodation support and onboarding guidance for Norway.
Professional screening and direct communication with our recruitment team.
applicationMethod: Submit your profile and updated CV through the application form.
Qualified candidates are contacted within 1 to 2 business days.
